name: Deep-Fried Yellow Bean Paste (Baa Yir)
recipeIngredient: Soaked in water for 30 minutes, then drained
Rolled into a cigarette shape and finely sliced into slivers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mortar, pound the drained moong beans to form a paste.
2. Add plain flour, red curry paste, light soy sauce, sugar, and kaffir lime leaves (in a rolled cigarette shape and finely sliced) one at a time, stirring well after each addition.
3. Form small pieces of the paste into balls about the size of a walnut; do not mold too tightly.
4. Deep-fry the balls until golden brown, then drain on paper towels.
5. Serve with the sweet sauce prepared below.
THE SAUCE:
1. In a saucepan, gently heat sugar, rice vinegar, and salt over low heat until the sugar dissolves completely.
2. Allow the sauce to cool before serving.
